overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag showing a character in a red pirate coat exploring a sunlit Caribbean colonial city. The character walks through bustling market streets with wooden carts and stalls, past colorful Spanish colonial buildings with teal and peach facades, and into quieter courtyards with stone archways and central wells.

scene_state.functional_zone: colonial waterfront market with wooden docks and merchant stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling market district, passing wooden carts and market stalls while navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: merchant standing behind a wooden stall with goods displayed

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a walkway near the water's edge
wooden market stall with canvas canopy and displayed goods
two-story Spanish colonial building with teal painted walls and white trim balconies
colonial building with peach-colored facade and arched doorways
wooden wagon cart loaded with hay bales parked on the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit colonial market district near the waterfront. Wooden docks line the left side while market stalls with canvas canopies occupy the center of the cobblestone street. Colorful Spanish colonial buildings in teal and peach line the street, and a wooden cart loaded with hay sits parked on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with colorful colonial houses and wooden walkways

events.description: a brown dog appears and begins following the character closely

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrower residential streets, turning corners past colorful buildings while a dog follows alongside

notable_agents.action: dog walking alongside and following the character through the streets

entered.detail: corner building with teal facade and ornate wooden balcony on the second floor
stacked wooden barrels near the building entrance
flowering bushes with red blooms along the building base
yellow painted colonial building with white trim and shuttered windows

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open market into narrower residential streets lined with colorful colonial buildings. A dog appears and follows the character as they turn corners past a prominent teal corner building with wooden balconies. Wooden barrels and flowering bushes line the cobblestone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: central town square with large tree and stone fountain

events.description: character enters the open town square from the narrow residential streets

agents.ego_description: walking through the town square passing groups of NPCs gathered near the central tree and fountain

notable_agents.action: group of women in period dresses standing and conversing near the tree

entered.detail: massive tree covered in ivy providing shade in the center of the square
stone water fountain with water visible in the basin
raised flower beds with colorful blooms along the square edge
partial stone wall ruins on the edge of the square

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious town square dominated by a large ivy-covered tree in the center. Groups of NPCs gather near a stone fountain, and the character walks past flower beds lining the dirt ground. The architecture shifts to show more open space with ruins visible on the right edge of the square.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered archway corridor leading to interior courtyard with stone well

events.description: character enters the blue-painted covered archway corridor
character emerges into the quiet courtyard with central stone well

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alley, entering a blue-painted covered archway, and emerging into a quiet courtyard with a stone well

entered.detail: covered corridor with bright blue painted walls and stone columns creating an archway
black and white checkered tile pattern on the floor of the corridor
circular stone well with raised walls in the center of the courtyard
grassy area with scattered flowers surrounding the well
decorative wrought iron gate set between stone pillars

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the open square and enters a narrow alley leading to a distinctive blue-painted covered archway with checkered tile flooring. Passing through the corridor, they emerge into a quiet interior courtyard featuring a central stone well surrounded by grass and flowers, enclosed by cream-colored colonial walls with wrought iron gates.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling Caribbean colonial city that transitions from a vibrant waterfront market into a secluded interior courtyard. It begins on a sunlit cobblestone street lined with wooden docks and canvas market stalls, passing colorful teal and peach buildings and a hay-laden cart. As the character moves away from the docks, the scene shifts into narrower residential lanes where a dog follows them past wooden balconies and flowering bushes. The path then opens into a spacious town square centered around a large ivy-covered tree and a stone fountain, before turning away from the open ruins and into a narrow alley. Finally, the camera passes through a blue-painted covered archway with checkered tiles to emerge into a quiet courtyard featuring a central stone well and wrought iron gates.
